title: Stains And Colors
description: This mod focuses on coloring wood!!
body:
**This mod is about coloring wood!!!**

Support Me on KO-FI for more exclusive content! And early betas for this mod!!

- Items:
1. Wood Stain
2. Wood colors(blue, cyan, light blue, green, lime, red, orange, purple, gray)
3. Scrapper
- Blocks:
1. Colored planks
